changeSet.author: msd
changeSet.comment: Schema for users/notebooks (placeholder auth + offline-first sync).

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS app.notebooks; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS app.users;

changeSet.author: msd
changeSet.comment: Dev-only seed user. Not applied in production.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO app.users (id, email, display_name) VALUES ( '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', 'dev@notebook.local', 'Dev User' ) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
